MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF 281 ELLIS STREET LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO WATCHFUL, INC.S CROSS-COMPLAINT AND FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO WATCHFUL, INC.'S SECOND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE is continued to September 3, 2021 to be heard with other pending motion. The Court notes that on March 2, 2021 parties filed a joint Stipulation to Alternative Dispute Resolution. Parties failed to respond to two e-mails sent by the case management department (3/11/21 and 5/21/21). No later than August 10, 2021 parties to respond to those e-mail communications and in good faith cooperate on setting a date for judicial mediation. No later than August 13, 2021 each party to submit compliance declaration. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
